evidence.q1: Excluded Liabilities has the meaning stated in Section 5.
evidence.q2: The contracts listed on Schedule 11 are Material Contracts.
evidence.q3: Within 60 days after closing, Buyer will deliver a closing statement
evidence.q4: The parties will sign and close this Agreement on the same date, and the simultaneous sign-and-close structure reflects the size and diligence posture of this transaction.
evidence.q5: At closing, Seller will sell to Buyer all assets used in or necessary for the SignalDesk business, including source code, object code, documentation, product data, domain names, code repositories, assignable intellectual property rights, customer records, assigned contracts, equipment, and goodwill.
evidence.q6: This Asset Purchase Agreement is entered into by and between Northstar Platform Labs, Inc. ("Buyer") and BuildLoop Systems, LLC ("Seller") for Buyer's acquisition of assets used in Seller's SignalDesk business.
